name: Mount Fuji
description: An iconic snow-capped stratovolcano and the highest peak in Japan, offering breathtaking sunrise views from the summit.

name: Santorini
description: A stunning volcanic island known for its white-washed buildings, blue-domed churches, and crystal-clear Aegean Sea views.

name: Bondi Beach
description: One of the world's most famous beaches, celebrated for its golden sands, surf culture, and vibrant coastal lifestyle.

name: Paris
description: The City of Light, famous for the Eiffel Tower, world-class cuisine, art museums, and romantic tree-lined boulevards.

name: Machu Picchu
description: A 15th-century Inca citadel set high in the Andes Mountains, widely regarded as one of the world's greatest archaeological sites.

name: Maldives
description: A tropical paradise of overwater bungalows, turquoise lagoons, and some of the world's most pristine coral reefs.

name: Bali
description: Island of the Gods, known for its forested volcanic mountains, iconic rice paddies, spiritual temples, and lively beach resorts.

name: Tokyo
description: A dazzling metropolis where ultra-modern skyscrapers stand next to ancient temples, serving extraordinary food at every corner.

name: Swiss Alps
description: Europe's rooftop offering dramatic alpine scenery, world-class skiing, charming mountain villages, and pristine glaciers.

name: Amalfi Coast
description: A stunning stretch of southern Italian coastline featuring dramatic cliffs, pastel-coloured fishing villages, and sparkling blue water.

name: Miami Beach
description: Famous for its Art Deco architecture, white sandy beaches, vibrant nightlife, and year-round warm Florida sunshine.

name: Barcelona
description: A captivating city blending Gaudí's surreal architecture, lively street culture, world-famous food markets, and Mediterranean beaches.

name: Himalayas
description: Home to the world's highest peaks including Mount Everest, offering epic trekking routes and awe-inspiring Himalayan vistas.

name: Great Barrier Reef
description: The world's largest coral reef system, stretching over 2,300 km and home to an extraordinary diversity of marine species.

name: Phuket
description: Thailand's largest island, renowned for its beautiful beaches, crystal-clear water, vibrant nightlife, and rich local culture.

name: New York
description: The city that never sleeps — home to iconic landmarks like Times Square, Central Park, and the Statue of Liberty.
